# Dev-only tooling installed into the local .venv.
# The Lambda image (built from server/Dockerfile) does NOT see this file —
# only server/requirements.txt ships into production.
#
# Lockfile: requirements-dev.lock (generated by `uv pip compile`)
# Sync:     uv pip sync requirements-dev.lock

-r server/requirements.txt
-r tools/requirements.txt

ruff
